_meta.description: Registre des assets PixelLab — prompts visuels, IDs, chemins Godot. Sert de reference pour generer des portraits de dialogue et recreer des sprites si besoin.
_meta.format_note: visual_prompt = prompt exact envoye a PixelLab. pixellab_id = UUID du personnage. godot_path = dossier sprites dans kanarion_front.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down sturdy middle-aged male guild master with short greying brown hair and a trimmed beard, sharp watchful eyes, weathered tanned face with a small scar on his chin. Wearing a dark green leather vest over a beige linen shirt with rolled-up sleeves, brown belt with a bronze guild crest buckle, sturdy brown trousers and boots. A worn logbook tucked under his arm. Practical no-nonsense stance with arms crossed, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Maitre de guilde, premier PNJ du tutoriel. Remplacement v2.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy fanatical leader NPC, chibi RPG style. 30-year-old man, light white armor, flowing cape, intense piercing eyes, short dark hair, clean-shaven, confident zealous stance, pixel art RPG style

A 2D top-down fantasy holy crusader boss, chibi RPG style. Same white armor as NPC Edric but battle-ready, wielding a large glowing sword or mace, tattered cape, more imposing stance, divine aura, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Version boss d'Edric. Prompt recupere via get_character().

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy frail old scholar NPC, chibi RPG style. Elderly frail man, worn dark robes, sunken tired eyes with dark circles, white thin hair, hunched posture, carrying ancient tomes, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: PNJ histoire. Prompt recupere via get_character().

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy worried village elder NPC, chibi RPG style. Middle-aged man or woman, simple sturdy clothes, anxious worried expression, greying hair, wringing hands, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: PNJ de Rochebourg. Prompt recupere via get_character().

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy humble old fisherman NPC, chibi RPG style. Elderly man, simple worn clothes, fishing hat, weathered face, carrying a fishing rod, patient calm expression, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Marcheur forme pecheur. Prompt recupere via get_character().

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy weary traveler NPC, chibi RPG style. Hooded figure, simple brown traveling robes, walking staff, dusty boots, tired but determined expression, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Marcheur forme voyageur. Prompt recupere via get_character().
PNJ forgeron. Prompt non recuperable (cree via UI PixelLab avec nom simple).

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down fantasy elderly craftswoman class master NPC for a mobile MMORPG. Chibi RPG style. Short old woman with weathered hands, slight limp visible in stance. Wears a patchwork apron combining forge leather, herb pouches, spice stains, and a small lute strapped on her back. White hair tied in a practical bun, sharp wise eyes, confident grounded posture. Carries a worn multi-tool cane that doubles as a walking stick. Warm earthy tones, brown, copper, and faded green. Clean readable silhouette, pixel art style, classic RPG NPC
npcs.notes: Vieille Nara. Prompt recupere via get_character().

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down one-armed young male scholar with warm brown messy hair falling over his forehead, hazel bright eyes, slight smirk, tanned skin. Wearing an ochre tan tunic with rolled-up sleeves and a brown leather belt, left arm missing with tunic neatly folded and sewn over the stump. Leather satchel stuffed with rolled maps at his hip. Reading glasses pushed up on forehead. Small ochre stone pendant necklace. Friendly curious posture leaning slightly forward, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Ezra Acte 1 — fidele, curieux, manchot gauche.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down one-armed male scholar looking worn and haunted, same brown hair but messier with first grey streaks at the temples, dark circles under hazel eyes, pale skin, no smile, distant gaze. Wearing a stained worn ochre tunic with a grey-blue shawl wrapped over shoulders with faint violet tint. Left arm stump crudely re-sewn. Clutching a small black notebook in his hand. Leather satchel overflowing with crumpled papers. Cracked glasses. Hunched withdrawn posture, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Ezra Acte 2 — ebranle, hante, premiers signes de corruption.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down dark corrupted male scholar, white silver hair with black streaks long and wild, pale violet glowing eyes, violet scar on face, grey ashen skin. His right arm is normal holding a dark grimoire. His left arm is completely replaced by a mass of dark purple black crystals growing as a jagged crystalline weapon. Wearing a long black coat with violet silver embroidery, tall black boots. Ochre stone pendant on chest. Rigid posture with false confidence, tragic and dangerous, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Ezra Acte 3 — tombe, cristaux sur bras gauche. Note: PixelLab inverse gauche/droite, le prompt dit 'left arm replaced' mais on a du ecrire 'right arm normal + left arm replaced' pour obtenir le bon resultat.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down one-armed male scholar with permanent white silver hair tied in a low ponytail, hazel eyes with faint golden glow, faded violet scar on face, tired but serene expression mature slight smirk. Crystal arm stump wrapped in blessed bandages that glow faintly gold. Wearing a simple off-white cream tunic with brown belt and short sand-colored cape. Simple wooden walking staff. Clean glasses. Ochre stone pendant prominently displayed on chest. Calm slightly humble posture, healed but scarred, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Ezra Acte 4 — rachete, cicatrices mais en paix.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down young village woman farmer with auburn hair tied in a messy bun, freckled sun-kissed skin, warm brown eyes, gentle smile. Wearing a simple beige linen dress with a dark brown apron, rolled-up sleeves showing tanned forearms, straw hat hanging on her back, small basket of vegetables in one hand. Simple leather sandals. Cheerful relaxed posture, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Villageoise 2, fermiere du village de Kanarion.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down old portly male merchant with a bald head and bushy white mustache, ruddy cheerful face, small round spectacles on his nose. Wearing a faded blue vest over a cream shirt, brown trousers held by suspenders, a coin pouch at his belt. Leaning slightly on a wooden cane. Warm approachable expression, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Villageois 3, vieux marchand du village de Kanarion.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down young teenage boy apprentice with messy sandy blond hair, bright curious green eyes, lanky build. Wearing a simple grey tunic too big for him with sleeves rolled up, a leather tool belt with a small hammer hanging from it, dusty brown trousers and scuffed boots. Carrying a wooden bucket. Eager slightly clumsy posture, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Villageois 4, jeune apprenti du village de Kanarion.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down stout middle-aged woman innkeeper with curly dark brown hair held back by a red bandana, round friendly face, laugh lines around her dark eyes. Wearing a dark red blouse with a cream apron stained from cooking, thick brown skirt, sturdy boots. A wooden ladle tucked in her apron pocket. Hands on hips confident welcoming posture, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Villageoise 5, taverniere du village de Kanarion.

npcs.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down tall muscular village guard with a square jaw, short cropped black hair, a long scar across his left cheek, serious stern dark eyes. Wearing a simple chainmail vest over a dark blue tunic, leather bracers, a wooden shield strapped to his back, iron-tipped spear in one hand. Leather boots and a brown belt with a small lantern. Standing at attention with a vigilant protective stance, pixel art RPG style
npcs.notes: Villageois 6, garde du village de Kanarion.

monsters.notes: Garde Zelote Lv19. Prompt original perdu, sprite remplace par nouvelle version.
Ritualiste Zelote Lv20. Prompt original perdu, sprite remplace par nouvelle version.

monsters.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down zealot inquisitor in heavy dark red and black robes with gold trim, hooded figure with glowing fanatical eyes beneath the hood, wielding a heavy iron censer on a chain dripping with smoke, ornate golden holy symbol on chest, armored gauntlets, stern imposing posture, pixel art RPG style

monsters.visual_prompt: A 2D top-down tragic half-crystallized male figure, entire left side of body consumed by dark purple black crystals growing through torn black coat, left eye covered by crystal, right eye still human hazel and weeping. Entirely white hair long and floating with energy. Beneath torn coat remnants of original ochre tunic visible. Ochre stone pendant trapped inside crystals on chest. Crystal arm extends like a weapon. Remaining hand clenched fighting himself. Body twisted in inner struggle, deeply tragic not a villain a lost friend, pixel art RPG style
monsters.notes: Ezra Perdu — boss Acte 4b. Demi-cristallise, tragique.
